text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian triumphs against Biwa Hayahide in an
impressive show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sisters promise to have a rematch. Although
in awe of her sister's performance, Biwa Hayahide
is confident that Narita Brian will be the one
chasing after her next time.
